'''鈭歱-ch-zh''' ('''pachazha''') is an [[Aelaki]] [[Verbs|stative verb]] meaning "[[Wikt:vulcanise|vulcanise]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| p-ch-zh
|-
! Word class
| [[Stative verb]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:vulcanise|vulcanise]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| 鈭歱-ch-zh
|-
! Lemma
| pachazha
|}

== [[Patient]] agreement paradigm ==
''Base present, no evidential.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:pachazhithi|pachazhithi]] || [[word:pachazhiji|pachazhiji]] || [[word:pachazhishi|pachazhishi]] || [[word:pachazhi|pachazhi]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:pachazhuthuth|pachazhuthuth]] || [[word:pachazhujuj|pachazhujuj]] || [[word:pachazhushush|pachazhushush]] || [[word:pachazh|pachazh]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:pachazhuthu|pachazhuthu]] || [[word:pachazhuju|pachazhuju]] || [[word:pachazhushu|pachazhushu]] || [[word:pachazhu|pachazhu]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:pachazhufuth|pachazhufuth]] || [[word:pachazhufuj|pachazhufuj]] || [[word:pachazhufush|pachazhufush]] || [[word:pachazhuf|pachazhuf]]
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:pachazhethe|pachazhethe]] || [[word:pachazheje|pachazheje]] || [[word:pachazheshe|pachazheshe]] || [[word:pachazhe|pachazhe]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:pachazhothoth|pachazhothoth]] || [[word:pachazhojoj|pachazhojoj]] || [[word:pachazhoshosh|pachazhoshosh]] || [[word:pachazh|pachazh]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:pachazhotho|pachazhotho]] || [[word:pachazhojo|pachazhojo]] || [[word:pachazhosho|pachazhosho]] || [[word:pachazho|pachazho]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:pachazhofoth|pachazhofoth]] || [[word:pachazhofoj|pachazhofoj]] || [[word:pachazhofosh|pachazhofosh]] || [[word:pachazhof|pachazhof]]
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:pachazh忙th忙|pachazh忙th忙]] || [[word:pachazh忙j忙|pachazh忙j忙]] || [[word:pachazh忙sh忙|pachazh忙sh忙]] || [[word:pachazh忙|pachazh忙]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:pachazhathath|pachazhathath]] || [[word:pachazhajaj|pachazhajaj]] || [[word:pachazhashash|pachazhashash]] || [[word:pachazh|pachazh]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:pachazhatha|pachazhatha]] || [[word:pachazhaja|pachazhaja]] || [[word:pachazhasha|pachazhasha]] || [[word:pachazha|pachazha]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:pachazhafath|pachazhafath]] || [[word:pachazhafaj|pachazhafaj]] || [[word:pachazhafash|pachazhafash]] || [[word:pachazhaf|pachazhaf]]
|}

== Evidential and TAM forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Form !! Surface form
|-
| [[stative]].none || [[word:pachazhasha|pachazhasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].none || [[word:gopachazhasha|gopachazhasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].none || [[word:gokipachazhasha|gokipachazhasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[present]] || [[word:pachazhn眉sha|pachazhn眉sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]] || [[word:gopachazhnkn眉sha|gopachazhnkn眉sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[present]] || [[word:gokipachazhn眉sha|gokipachazhn眉sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:pachazhsh毛sha|pachazhsh毛sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gopachazhnksh毛sha|gopachazhnksh毛sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokipachazhsh毛sha|gokipachazhsh毛sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:pachazhrosha|pachazhrosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:gopachazhnkrosha|gopachazhnkrosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokipachazhrosha|gokipachazhrosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[inferential]] || [[word:pachazhmusha|pachazhmusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]] || [[word:gopachazhnkmusha|gopachazhnkmusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]] || [[word:gokipachazhmusha|gokipachazhmusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[mythical]] || [[word:pachazhsherasha|pachazhsherasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[mythical]] || [[word:gopachazhnksherasha|gopachazhnksherasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[mythical]] || [[word:gokipachazhsherasha|gokipachazhsherasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[intention]] || [[word:pachazhngasha|pachazhngasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[intention]] || [[word:gopachazhnkngasha|gopachazhnkngasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[intention]] || [[word:gokipachazhngasha|gokipachazhngasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[optative]] || [[word:pachazhyasha|pachazhyasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[optative]] || [[word:gopachazhnkyasha|gopachazhnkyasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[optative]] || [[word:gokipachazhyasha|gokipachazhyasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:pachazhyamasha|pachazhyamasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:gopachazhnkyamasha|gopachazhnkyamasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:gokipachazhyamasha|gokipachazhyamasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:pachazhn眉sh毛sha|pachazhn眉sh毛sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:gopachazhnkn眉sh毛sha|gopachazhnkn眉sh毛sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokipachazhn眉sh毛sha|gokipachazhn眉sh毛sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:pachazhn眉rosha|pachazhn眉rosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gopachazhnkn眉rosha|gopachazhnkn眉rosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokipachazhn眉rosha|gokipachazhn眉rosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:pachazhn眉musha|pachazhn眉musha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gopachazhnkn眉musha|gopachazhnkn眉musha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokipachazhn眉musha|gokipachazhn眉musha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:pachazhsh毛n眉sha|pachazhsh毛n眉sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:gopachazhnksh毛n眉sha|gopachazhnksh毛n眉sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokipachazhsh毛n眉sha|gokipachazhsh毛n眉sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:pachazhsh毛rosha|pachazhsh毛rosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gopachazhnksh毛rosha|gopachazhnksh毛rosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokipachazhsh毛rosha|gokipachazhsh毛rosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:pachazhsh毛musha|pachazhsh毛musha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gopachazhnksh毛musha|gopachazhnksh毛musha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokipachazhsh毛musha|gokipachazhsh毛musha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:pachazhron眉sha|pachazhron眉sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:gopachazhnkron眉sha|gopachazhnkron眉sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokipachazhron眉sha|gokipachazhron眉sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:pachazhrosh毛sha|pachazhrosh毛sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:gopachazhnkrosh毛sha|gopachazhnkrosh毛sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokipachazhrosh毛sha|gokipachazhrosh毛sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:pachazhromusha|pachazhromusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gopachazhnkromusha|gopachazhnkromusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokipachazhromusha|gokipachazhromusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:pachazhmun眉sha|pachazhmun眉sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:gopachazhnkmun眉sha|gopachazhnkmun眉sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokipachazhmun眉sha|gokipachazhmun眉sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:pachazhmush毛sha|pachazhmush毛sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:gopachazhnkmush毛sha|gopachazhnkmush毛sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokipachazhmush毛sha|gokipachazhmush毛sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:pachazhmurosha|pachazhmurosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gopachazhnkmurosha|gopachazhnkmurosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokipachazhmurosha|gokipachazhmurosha]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.none || [[word:pachazh|pachazh]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.none_[[gnomic]] || [[word:p忙ch忙zh|p忙ch忙zh]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[probable]] || [[word:hopachazh|hopachazh]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[probable]]_[[gnomic]] || [[word:hop忙ch忙zh|hop忙ch忙zh]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[probable]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:hohopachazh|hohopachazh]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[probable]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:hohop忙ch忙zh|hohop忙ch忙zh]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[inchoative]] || [[word:n眉pachazh|n眉pachazh]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[inchoative]]_[[gnomic]] || [[word:n眉p忙ch忙zh|n眉p忙ch忙zh]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[inchoative]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:n眉n眉pachazh|n眉n眉pachazh]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[inchoative]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:n眉n眉p忙ch忙zh|n眉n眉p忙ch忙zh]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[cessative]] || [[word:n茂pachazh|n茂pachazh]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[cessative]]_[[gnomic]] || [[word:n茂p忙ch忙zh|n茂p忙ch忙zh]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[cessative]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:n茂n茂pachazh|n茂n茂pachazh]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[cessative]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:n茂n茂p忙ch忙zh|n茂n茂p忙ch忙zh]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[resumptive]] || [[word:lupachazh|lupachazh]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[resumptive]]_[[gnomic]] || [[word:lup忙ch忙zh|lup忙ch忙zh]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[resumptive]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:lulupachazh|lulupachazh]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[resumptive]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:lulup忙ch忙zh|lulup忙ch忙zh]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[repetitive]]_[[cess]] || [[word:lipachazh|lipachazh]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[repetitive]]_[[cess]]_[[gnomic]] || [[word:lip忙ch忙zh|lip忙ch忙zh]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[repetitive]]_[[cess]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:lilipachazh|lilipachazh]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[repetitive]]_[[cess]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:lilip忙ch忙zh|lilip忙ch忙zh]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]] || [[word:kopachazh|kopachazh]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[gnomic]] || [[word:kop忙ch忙zh|kop忙ch忙zh]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:kokopachazh|kokopachazh]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:kokop忙ch忙zh|kokop忙ch忙zh]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[cess]] || [[word:kepachazh|kepachazh]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[cess]]_[[gnomic]] || [[word:kep忙ch忙zh|kep忙ch忙zh]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[cess]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:kekepachazh|kekepachazh]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[cess]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:kekep忙ch忙zh|kekep忙ch忙zh]]
|}

''93 forms generated.''

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki verbs]]
[[Category:Aelaki stative verbs]]
[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|654f723}}
